Home › Seminole County › Winter Springs › Healthy Options Restaurants

Healthy Options Restaurants in Winter Springs

4 restaurants with healthy options in Winter Springs, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 2 currently hold an A, on an average 4.6-star diner rating.

4 healthy options restaurants

  • A 100 M
    MOSAIC SENOR TEQUILA MEXICAN GRILL Mexican ★ 4.4 (1664) Winter Springs · Seminole County VegOrganic +1 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 95 C
    CARRABBA'S ITALIAN GRILL Italian ★ 4.5 (2660) Winter Springs · Seminole County VegGF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • B 80 K
    KEKE'S BREAKFAST CAFE American ★ 4.8 (4891) Winter Springs · Seminole County VegOrganic +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • F 42 A
    AGAVE AZUL COCINA MEXICANA Mexican ★ 4.8 (6813) Winter Springs · Seminole County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected May 2026
